summary: Frontend-only test of DialBox iteration 8: layout reorder (controls above CRT) and new Endless Adventure AI mode. Verified via Playwright on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Core features PASS end-to-end.

minor.issue: Intermittent '// audio channel unavailable' error line appears in CRT during AI adventure flows (TTS speak() throws). Non-blocking — the story text still renders and gameplay continues, but the error message is visible to users.

integration_issues.flow: Dial 3 MindLine regression after switching lines
integration_issues.issue: One-off timeout: mindline-input did not appear within 10s after Fortune->0->3 sequence in the same session. Dial 8 immediately after worked. Likely flaky (backend mindlineStart latency); needs re-verification.

action_items: Investigate why api.tts() intermittently fails during the Endless Adventure entry sequence (speak of 'Wonderful. Give me a moment…'). Suppress or retry so the '// audio channel unavailable' error line does not pollute the CRT.
Verify Dial 3 MindLine still starts reliably after coming back from another line (Fortune->0->3). May be a backend latency issue; consider extending the busy timeout or showing a loading state.
critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx is 1269 lines — consider splitting per-line handlers (Fortune, MindLine, Magic8, Knock, Adventure) into hooks for maintainability.

speak() catch pushes '// audio channel unavailable' to the CRT even for non-critical prompts (e.g., operator options). Consider silent-failing operator-voice prompts to avoid confusing error lines during otherwise-successful AI flow.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (all critical iteration-8 features pass; 1 flaky regression)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: (1) lift-handset-btn / hangup-btn / keypad / hold-to-talk-btn all render ABOVE data-testid='crt-console'. (2) Dial 4 shows 4 story options including 'Endless Adventure — you name the theme'. (3) Pressing 4 opens adventure-theme-input with placeholder. (4) Submitting 'friendly dinosaurs' via Enter -> pushed 'theme: friendly dinosaurs' and '✍ The storyteller is dreaming up your adventure…' then GPT rendered '▶ Endless: friendly dinosaurs' + coherent kid-safe opening scene with 3 numbered choices ('Follow the chime trail', 'Call Tilly for directions', 'Ask nearby dinos for help'). (5) Fortune dial 1 oracle list works; Magic8 dial 8 input works. NOTE: Real AI story-advancement to endings (~7 turns) was not fully clicked through — main agent can spot-check but backend team confirmed AI branching + endings in iteration_7. NOTE: TTS produces occasional '// audio channel unavailable' lines but flow continues. Read the CRT via [data-testid='crt-console'] not body (config panel repeats menu text).
rca of the issue: The '// audio channel unavailable' line is emitted by speak() catch in PhoneSimulator.jsx (~line 194). It appears when api.tts throws; likely occurs when a second speak() call is fired while the previous audio element is still resolving, or when the TTS backend rate-limits. Mitigation: (a) swallow the error for optional/operator prompts, or (b) queue speak calls to serialize them, or (c) retry once on transient failure.
